title: Take-a-Break (TAB)
text:
Take-a-Break (TAB) - SupportGoWhere
Take-a-Break (TAB)
Share link
Take-a-Break (TAB) is a respite care programme to provide caregivers temporary relief from their caregiving responsibilities.

Based on their needs, caregivers may choose from a range of home-based respite care services and determine the frequency of service over a specific duration.

Subsidies are available for eligible caregivers.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Provides caregivers with temporary relief from caregiving responsibilities.
Offers flexibility in respite options, allowing caregivers to choose from a range of home-based respite care services that best suit their needs.
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provide temporary relief for caregivers from their caregiving responsibilities, allowing them to rest, attend to personal needs, or manage other commitments

 

Offers flexibility in respite options, allowing caregivers to choose from a range of home-based respite care services that best suit their needs.

Who is this for?

Caregiver or care recipient is a Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident;

Caregiver of persons with any one or more of the following disability types:

Autism

Intellectual Disability

Physical Disability: Requires some assistance with at least 1 of the 6 Activities of Daily Living due to physical impairment

Sensory Disability

Children and young persons with Developmental Needs and/or in EIPIC

How to apply?

Please approach a social service professional from a touchpoint (e.g. Social Service Agency (SSA), hospitals etc.) to apply.

You can contact email SPD directly if assistance is needed for applying to TAB.

Email: Tab@spd.org.sg

Where can I find help?

Take-A-Break (TAB) programme - SPD

SPD: 6579 0796

Tab@spd.org.sg

2 Peng Nguan Street Spd Ability Centre 168955



Scheme last updated 24 Apr 2026
